title: How to compile SV testbench with DPI-C ?
body:
I have the following two files:

file1.sv
```
module top_tb; 
  import "DPI-C" function void load_x(....);
  initial load_x(...);
endmodule
```

file2.c
```
#include <svdpi.h>

void load_x (...) {
  // do something
}
```

I run the following command:
```
verilator --binary -j 0 -Wno-fatal --relative-includes --top top_tb file1.sv file2.c
```

And I get the following error:
```
undefined reference to `load_x'
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2> ...
```

Seems like Verilator is unable to link these two files. How do I call verilator correctly?
